tasks.subject: Task 1: actionRunner core + unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A self-contained, mutex-safe goroutine-orchestrator that runs miniscram as a subprocess with line-tailed stderr, SIGTERM cancel, and single-flight enforcement. Full unit-test coverage via TestMain re-exec as a fake binary.

**Files:**
- Create: tools/miniscram-gui/runner.go
- Create: tools/miniscram-gui/runner_test.go

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] go test ./... passes (happy, fail, cancel, single-flight, invalidate-tick)
- [ ] No goroutine leak per runtime.NumGoroutine
- [ ] go vet ./... clean

**Verify:** `cd tools/miniscram-gui && go test -race -count=1 ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/miniscram-gui/runner.go", "tools/miniscram-gui/runner_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd tools/miniscram-gui && go test -race -count=1 ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all five tests pass", "no goroutine leak", "go vet clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: runningStrip widget + Pack/Verify migration + window-close cleanup
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Render the running-state visually and migrate the existing synchronous Pack/Verify handlers to use actionRunner. Window close cancels any in-flight subprocess. Adds the cancelled status branch to the events status chip.

**Files:**
- Modify: tools/miniscram-gui/runner.go (append runningStripWidget)
- Modify: tools/miniscram-gui/main.go (model.runner field, replace handlers, render strip in layout, cancelled chip palette, app.DestroyEvent cleanup, remove dead recordPackEvent/recordVerifyEvent)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Pack/Verify run async via runner; UI doesn't freeze
- [ ] Strip shows action verb, current stderr line, elapsed seconds, Cancel
- [ ] Cancel mid-pack records a 'cancelled' event row with grey CANCELLED chip
- [ ] Closing window during action leaves no orphan miniscram process within 5s
- [ ] go vet ./... clean; existing tests still pass

**Verify:** Manual smoke per plan steps 6 + 7; `cd tools/miniscram-gui && go vet ./... && go test -race -count=1 ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/miniscram-gui/runner.go", "tools/miniscram-gui/main.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd tools/miniscram-gui && go vet ./... && go test -race -count=1 ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Pack/Verify async via runner", "strip renders correctly", "Cancel produces cancelled status", "no orphan subprocess on window close"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: toast widget + Unpack handler with pickSave + revealInFolder
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire the Unpack… button end-to-end: native save dialog (pickSave per platform), shell out via runner, success toast with Reveal-in-folder. Toast applies to all three actions on success; cleared on fail/cancel.

**Files:**
- Modify: tools/miniscram-gui/runner.go (append toastState + toastWidget)
- Modify: tools/miniscram-gui/main.go (pickSave, revealInFolder, model.toast, Unpack click handler with self-overwrite refusal, toast button handlers, layout integration)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Unpack opens native save dialog (zenity on Linux dev box) with default name and dir
- [ ] Cancel of dialog = no-op
- [ ] Picking source path as output = refused with clear fail event
- [ ] Successful unpack/pack shows toast with size + duration + Reveal in folder
- [ ] Toast self-dismisses after 6s; ✕ dismisses immediately
- [ ] Reveal in folder opens OS file manager at output dir
- [ ] go vet ./... clean; existing tests still pass

**Verify:** Manual smoke per plan steps 6 + 7; `cd tools/miniscram-gui && go vet ./... && go test -race -count=1 ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/miniscram-gui/runner.go", "tools/miniscram-gui/main.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd tools/miniscram-gui && go vet ./... && go test -race -count=1 ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Unpack runs with native save dialog", "self-overwrite refused", "toast appears + reveal works", "toast self-dismisses"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: CI — run go test for the GUI module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend the existing build miniscram-gui CI job to run go test ./... so Task 1's unit tests run on every push.

**Files:**
- Modify: .github/workflows/ci.yml (add Test step under the gui job)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Push to PR branch shows both 'build + test' and 'build miniscram-gui' jobs SUCCESS
- [ ] The new Test step actually runs (visible in job logs)

**Verify:** `git push && gh run watch <id> --exit-status`

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/ci.yml"], "verifyCommand": "git push && gh run watch <latest> --exit-status", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CI green on PR branch", "Test step in gui job logs"]}
```
